AC1.description: Card shows route name, formatted date (e.g., 'Mar 15, 2026'), and formatted distance
AC1.test: should satisfy AC1: formats timestamp to readable date string

AC2.description: Today's date shows in same format, no 'Today' special casing
AC2.test: should satisfy AC2: today date uses same format, no special casing

AC3.description: Very long name (50+ chars) truncates with ellipsis, layout intact
AC3.test: should satisfy AC3: accepts very long route names

AC4.description: Distance of 0 meters displays as '0m', no crash or NaN
AC4.test: should satisfy AC4: accepts zero distance string
